title: Hazards!
description: Adding bad effects to rain, sunlight or local areas in the world
body:
# Hazards

This is a mod meant mostly for modpack makers so they can add a challenge to their world. You can make the rain deadly. Or the sunlight. Or you can have areas in the world that are polluted. This mod is extremely configurable:

- You can configure armor from other modpacks to help fight these challenges
- You can control the radiation per dimension
- You can enable the bad effects for villagers and also for passive animals if you want
- There is a radiation monitor
- You can give straight damage and/or potion effects

## Screenshot
Here is an image of the radiation monitor while standing close to a weak radiation source:

![Radiation Monitor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/mc4zdSL4/images/35f4c0290c19e4dee7399f57c61a76dd8cbf367c.png)

## Modpacks
This mod can be used in any modpack without restriction.
